title: 3D Totem of Undying+
description: A polished golden Totem of Undying that feels truly vanilla+.
body:
## ✨ 3D Totem of Undying+ Resource Pack

Replace the default Minecraft totem with a **clean, golden vanilla+ totem** that looks more detailed, iconic, and satisfying to use. **Golden Totem of Undying+** upgrades the totem’s appearance while staying perfectly balanced with Minecraft’s original style.

✨ **Why download this pack?**
- ✔ **Improved golden totem design** with better depth & shading
- ✔ Expressive eyes for a more alive look
- ✔ **Vanilla-friendly style** — fits naturally in-game
- ✔ Clear visibility in hotbar & offhand
- ✔ **Lightweight & performance-friendly**
- ✔ Visual upgrade only — **no gameplay changes**

✨ Perfect for players who want a **more rewarding and premium-looking Totem of Undying** without breaking the vanilla feel.

---

⌚ **Download GOAL**
 500 - please help

---

## 📥 Installation Guide

1. Download the **Golden Totem of Undying+ Resource Pack (.zip)**
2. Open Minecraft → **Options → Resource Packs → Open Pack Folder**
3. Move the `.zip` file into the **resourcepacks** folder
4. Go back to Minecraft and **enable the pack**
5. Click **Done** and enjoy your new totem!

---

## 🧩 Supported Versions
- **Minecraft 26.1**
- **Minecraft 1.21.11**
- **Minecraft 1.21.6 – 1.21.10**

---

## 🧾 Credits
- **Made by Pushkraj**
- ❌ You are **NOT allowed** to copy or reuse these assets in other packs

---

💾 **Download now and make every save feel special**
